title: clerodendrum dembianense
intro: Clerodendrum dembianense, also known as the Ethiopian glorybower, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum dembianense include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
